title: Dawn of Berk
description: HTTYD in Minecraft! Enjoy a Modpack filled with Dragons, Vikings, Dungeons and Castles with HTTYD references and so much more!...
body:
![Banner Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Dawn_of_Berk/MP_DawnOfBerk_header.webp)
[![Banner Bisecthosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Dawn_of_Berk/MP_DawnOfBerk_promo.webp)](https://tinyurl.com/amy67484)
![Banner Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Dawn_of_Berk/MP_DawnOfBerk_overview.webp)
---
Ready to start your own HTTYD adventure? Jump into a world filled with dragons just like How To Train Your Dragon! Ride, tame and breed various dragons's throughout your world. Fight alongside them as you explore the deepest depths of a dungeon or perhaps ride them peacefully into the sunset. Soar and explore through your world with viking weapons and armour, pillaging until your heart is content. Settle down ontop of the highest volcanic peaks or live your life on the frozen peaks! All possible in **Dawn of Berk**.

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/dawn-of-berk)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/dawn-of-berk)
[![kofi-plural-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/xaz-4r_2WBo?si=5BS9IFWE49MHzOU4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Banner Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Dawn_of_Berk/MP_DawnOfBerk_features.webp)
---
- [✔️] **All Things Vikings** - What's this? You've found a viking weapon, village, decoration and more...!
- [✔️] **Dungeons** - Feeling adventurous? Time to tackle a complex dungeon going from its peak to its deepest depths.
- [✔️] **Unique World Generation** - Fly peacefully through tall mountains and large plains, or perhaps skim the surface off deep oceans travel the vast plains with Terralith and Geophilic.
- [✔️] **Dragons** - The wildlife can be a bit treacherous but don't worry these flying lizards prefer a larger lunch or do they...? With over 20+ different species to find, traverse the lands for these large lizards or perhaps become lunch instead.
- **And so much more...!**


[![Banner Discord](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Dawn_of_Berk/MP_DawnOfBerk_discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/N8tUm6N4Qc)
### Modpack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator playing this Modpack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Modpack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Modpack or any modified version is not allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
